name: Refund Policy (shared fallback)
description: Shared default layout when theme has no refund_policy.json

config.content.title: Refund Policy
config.content.body: This Refund Policy explains the conditions under which refunds may be requested and processed. Please read it carefully before making a purchase or deposit.
config.toc.items:
Overview|This Refund Policy explains the conditions under which refunds may be requested and processed. Please read it carefully before making a purchase or deposit.
Eligibility for Refunds|Refunds may be considered for duplicate transactions, technical errors that resulted in incorrect charges, or as required by applicable law. Refunds are not available for used services or where terms of the service have been fully delivered.
How to Request a Refund|To request a refund, contact our support team with your account details, transaction reference, and reason for the request. We will review your case and respond within the timeframes required by law.
Processing Time|Approved refunds are typically processed within 5–10 business days. The time for the amount to appear in your account depends on your bank or payment provider.
Contact|For questions about this policy or to submit a refund request, please use our Contact Us page or the support email provided on the platform.

notes: Fallback via ComponentService when style-specific layout missing
